text:
c++ -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I.. -I../dcop -I../kdecore -I../kdeui -I../kssl -I/usr/X11R6/include/qt2 -I/usr/X11R6/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -O2 -fno-exceptions -fno-check-new -Wall -pedantic -W -Wpointer-arith -Wmissing-prototypes -Wwrite-strings -Wno-long-long -fno-builtin -ggdb -frtti -DQT_CLEAN_NAMESPACE -DQT_NO_COMPAT -DQT_NO_ASCII_CAST -c kaction.cpp  -fPIC -DPIC -o .libs/kaction.o

Not yet known. A kde2 port problem or a g++ problem ?
How-To-Repeat: The error is repeatable.
